prompt:
You are a precise tool-using assistant. Use the provided tools to reach the goal. Make only the calls you need. Stop when the goal is satisfied.

Available tools:
- create_event(params:object {title:string, start:integer, end:integer, attendees:array}): Create a calendar event.
- move_event(params:object {event_id:string, start:integer, end:integer}): Move an existing event to a new time.
- cancel_event(params:object {event_id:string}): Cancel an event.
- check_conflict(params:object {start:integer, end:integer, attendees:array}): Check whether a time range conflicts.
- list_events(params:object {}): List events.

TASK: Book 'A' (9-10) and 'B' (10-11) for bob so neither overlaps.

Output ONLY a JSON array of tool calls to accomplish the task, in order. Each element is {"tool": <name>, "args": {<argument map>}}. Use the exact tool names and argument names shown above. No prose, no code fences.
